'''Gogomars''' were creatures of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. They were used as sacrifices by the [[Shaman/Legends|shamans]] of the [[Alwari]]. They would read the entrails of the dead gogomar in order to resolve important affairs.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{Mo}}
